titleStmt.title: SII 9.497: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 497. (A.R. No. 196 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE MARAMMA TEMPLE AT TAGARAPURAM, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1437, Bhāva, Chaitra, ba. 5, Śukravāra corresponding to A.D. 1514 April 14 Friday, in the reign of the Vijayanagara king Kṛishṇa-Dharma-Mahādhi- rāya (Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya). It records the grant of the village Tagavūru to Sōmayyadēva-Voḍeya, son of Bāloḍeya of Mōgūru, by Sāḷuva Gōvindarāja, made with the consent of his elder brother, the Mahāpradhāna Sāḷuva Timmarasa, under the orders of the king. The king is stated to be the son of Narasiṁha-Dharma-Mahārāja. The donee's grandfather Sōmēśvarāchārya, also called Mallikārjuna, was the guru of Vīra-Rudra of Ōruṅgal.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya pṛthvīmanōnayanavallabha śrīmanmahārājā
dhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīmanmahāmēdinī�vosaragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva śrīmaddakṣiṇasa
mudrādipati nārasiṁhadharmmamāhārājatanūbhava prabalapratāpa sakalabhū
�vośvaranikaramakuṭavinyastacaraṇāraviṁdayugala sarvvabhuvanapracārakutūhali
takīrtti kuladēvatāsahacara parākramaprasūti prathamaprajāpati durddharavairivakṣasthala
dalana galaddhārārudhirōpahāradurlalitavīralakṣmīsamākarṣaṇamaṁtra pitranvā
gatasamastavibudhavarasaṁdōhānaṁdakaraṇavicāraviśārada śrīmatkṛṣṇadharma
mahādhirāyaṁ samastapṛthvīrājyaṁgeyyuttiralā rāyara nirūpadiṁ ta
nmahāpradhāna sāḷuva timmarasavarmmānumatadiṁ tadanuja sāḷuva gōviṁdarājaga
ḷu śakavarṣa 1437 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada caitra ba 5 śukravāradalū . Ōruṁgallā
bhidhēyapravarapuravarō vīrarudrāvanīśō bhṛṁgīyatyaṁghriyugmē bhuvi sara
siruhē yasya vidyōdayasya . vāṇī bhēdātmavādyuddhatamadakalakuṁbhasthaḷīyāṁkuśī
yatyāryyaśrīmallikāddyarjunagurarabhinūtnāttapūrvvaḥ samāsīt . tasya sōmēśvarācā
ryyavaryyasya tanayōbhavat sakalāgamasaṁpannō bālanāthō gurūttamaḥ . Iṁ
tanvayasaṁśuddharāda mōgūra bāloḍiyara tanūbhava sōmayyadēvavo
ḍiyarige dānārthamāgi śilāsthāpanava māḍi koṭṭa tagavūra grāmada catussī
meya vivara mūḍalu kuṁtūra cilakavāḍiya tagavūra trisaṁdhikalu 1 purada
cilakavāḍiya tagavūra trisaṁdhikalu 1 voḷageṟeya kētedēvara kalu 1 bāliha
ḷḷiya hūvinakaṭṭeya kallu 1 keṁgaḍūra ko(ṁ)mmegeṟeya tōkuḷiya haḷḷada kallu
1 bōgekeṟeya mūḍaṇa kōḍiya kallū 1 keṁgaḍūra mālaṁggiya tagavūra trisaṁ
dhikallu 1 kuṁtūra guḍḍada huṭṭukallu 1 Iṁtī Aṣṭadikkinoḷagaṇa mūvatta
ydu liṁgamudreya kalloḷagāda tagavūra grāmada sunka suvarnnādāya gadde
tōṭa viśēṣa carādāya modalāgi nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇa Āgāmi siddhi sādhya
veṁbaṣṭabhōga tējasvāmyavanu ni(ṁ)mma strīputrajñātisāvaṁtadāyādānuma
tapurassaravāgi samastabaḷi sahavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi Anubha
visi bahiri yeṁdu māḍida dharmasādhana . svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pū
rvvadattānupālanāt . pūrvadattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavē
t . vanē vanagatō vahniḥsvayaṁ dahati trikulaṁ mūlāni daha
ti dharmasyāgatapāragāt . svadattā vā yō harēti vasuṁdha
rāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
yo dānavanu Aḷihidavaru vāraṇāsiyali taṁma guru taṁde tāya
kapileyanu vadhisida pāvakke hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 9.497 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
